name: privategpt
description: One command: tunnel + FastAPI + Next.js (LM Studio manual on :1234).

scripts.dev: node scripts/dev-banner.cjs && concurrently -n tunnel,api,web -c cyan,blue,magenta "node scripts/dev-tunnel.cjs" "node scripts/dev-backend.cjs" "npm run dev --prefix web"
scripts.dev:local: node scripts/dev-banner.cjs && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "node scripts/dev-backend.cjs" "npm run dev --prefix web"
